summary: Full backend+frontend test of NEXUS.os Phase 1. 7/7 pytest backend tests pass (teams shape, orchestrate routing, validation). Frontend dashboard loads with CEO + 5 agents + terminal + command bar + 3 locked teams. Both chip-trigger and command-input submission flows work end-to-end: CEO thinking → routing → agent working → terminal logs stream → output dialog opens → close works → toast fires. SEO keyword routing verified (SEO Specialist delivered). SVG connection lines render (46 paths drawn on canvas).

issues: Minor: the 'Future Expansions' locked-teams row visually overlaps the floating CommandBar chips tray at 1920x1080 viewport (locked team cards appear faintly behind the chip bar). Increase bottom padding on canvas section or raise z-index for locked-teams above command bar backdrop.

action_items: Optional: add data-testid="connection-line-<agent_id>" on SVG <path> elements in ConnectionLines.jsx for more robust future testing (currently paths exist but are not individually test-id'd).
Optional: fix slight visual overlap between locked-teams row and floating CommandBar at shorter viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py keeps unused Mongo client connection despite ephemeral Phase 1 (no DB writes) — fine but consider guarding with feature flag.
execute_task_dummy is clearly marked as LLM-swap point (good).
Orchestrate returns 6 steps as expected (1 user info + thinking + routing + agent ack + agent success + CEO confirm).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 7 required orchestrate+teams cases. Frontend data-testids in use: dashboard-root, ceo-node, agent-card-<id>, terminal-aside, command-input, command-submit, quick-task-<agent_id>, output-dialog, output-close, locked-teams, log-line-<idx>. All flows verified live against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. System fully functional per Phase 1 spec.
